ddls:
CREATE TABLE "posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the post */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the post */,
  "body" TEXT /* Text content of the post */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Comma-separated tags for categorization */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes received */,
  "comments_count" INTEGER /* Number of comments on the post */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the post was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the post was last updated */,
  "img_path" TEXT /* File path to the image associated with the post */,
  "approved" INTEGER /* Approval status of the post (true if approved, false if pending or rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, moderator, user) */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* File path to the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the user */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is currently active */,
  "last_active" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post the image is associated with */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the image */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the image in bytes */,
  "image_description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  "alt_text" TEXT /* Alternative text for accessibility */,
  "width" INTEGER /* Width of the image in pixels */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the image in pixels */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the image was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post that was modified */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "old_content" TEXT /* Content of the post before the update */,
  "new_content" TEXT /* Content of the post after the update */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was performed */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Details of the action (e.g., new content, reason for deletion) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_history_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moderation" (
  "moderation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each moderation action */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post being moderated */,
  "moderator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the moderator who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of moderation action (e.g., approve, reject) */,
  "review_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes from the moderator */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Indicates if the post has been flagged for review */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was performed */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the moderation action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("moderation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderation_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderation_moderator_id FOREIGN KEY ("moderator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post related to the notification */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., post approval, moderation action) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "link" TEXT /* Direct link to the relevant post or action */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was sent */,
  "expires_at" TEXT /* Expiration date for the notification */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Read status of the notification (true if read, false if unread) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
